title: Sukju Mung Bean Buns
description: A unique fusion of Korean and Middle Eastern flavors, these buns are filled with a savory mixture of mung beans and sukju, wrapped in crispy pastry.
instructions: Roll out the flattened pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a bowl, mix together the mung bean, sukju, garlicky sprout, and bean sprout.
Place a tablespoon of the mung bean mixture onto one half of the pastry, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Brush the edges with water and fold the other half of the pastry over the filling to form a half-moon shape.
Press the edges to seal and use a fork to crimp them.
Brush the tops of the buns with water and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve the buns warm with your favorite dipping sauce.
